page_title: Hisshou Pachinko ★ Pachislot Kouryaku Series Vol. 14: CR Neon Genesis Evangelion 〜The Beginning of the End〜
text:
is pachinko simulation game based on the CR Neon Genesis Evangelion— The Beginning and the End machine, released on 30 July 2009 by D3 Publisher.
